name: Spiderman Jump
description: Spiderman wants to jump through the web and pass through the ring of fire. Different challenges await you in each chapter. To play, tap the screen and adjust the jump angle by swiping left and right. Good luck. fun game
instructions: Tap the sceen to play Adjust the jump angle by touching the screen and swiping left and right
tags: 1 Player, Action, Boy, Boys, Fun, Game, HTML5, jump, Jumping, Spiderman
